title: rosa graveolens var. micrantha
intro: Rosa graveolens var. micrantha, also known as Dwarf Pink Rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa graveolens, a fragrant wild rose native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa graveolens var. micrantha include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating digestive issues due to its calming and soothing effects. Rosa graveolens var. micrantha is often used to make herbal preparations such as rosehip tea, rose oil, and rose petal tincture, which are used to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
